ソフィアはそう言いながら、着衣の乱れを正して、ベッドから出る。:
Saying that, Sophia straightened her disheveled clothes and got out
of bed.
そろそろ自分の部屋に戻るか？ それなら送っていくが。<br>もちろんこのまま朝ま:
Are you going back to your room now? I'll walk you. But of course, I'd
rather you stayed here until morning...
え……、それって、ここに泊まるってこと……？<br>朝まで……？ ど、どうしよう: Huh... so you mean, stay over? Until morning...? W-What should I do...
どうしたんだ、妙にモジモジして。<br>もしかして物足りなかったのか？: What's wrong? You're fidgeting. Could it be you weren't satisfied?
はぁっ！？ あ、あんなにされたのに、そんなわけがないでしょう！<br>人を変態扱: *gasp*! After all that, there's no way! Don't treat me like a pervert!
ただ、その……、<br>キス……してなかったなぁ……って……。: It's just... you know... we didn't kiss, did we...
あぁ、そういえば、そうだな。: Oh, now that you mention it, you're right.
そういえばって……！ ふ、普通、そっちが先じゃないの？<br>私、男の人とキスし:
'Now that you mention it'...! I-In the usual order, that should come
first, shouldn't it? I've never even kissed a man before...
彼女が物足りなそうにしている理由が判明し、<br>温かい気持ちになる。:
The reason she seemed unsatisfied became clear, and I felt a warm
feeling.
えーと……。<br>じゃあ順番が逆になってしまったが、今からするか？: Let's see... Well, the order got reversed, but should we do it now?
じゃあって何よ、じゃあって！<br>取ってつけたようにキスしようとしないでよ！:
What do you mean 'well'? Don't "well" me! Don't try to kiss me like it's
an afterthought! Idiot!
えっ？ な、何よ……急に真顔になって。: Eh? W-What is it... you're suddenly so serious.
ソフィアがそう言いかける途中で、そっと唇を重ねる。<br>その瞬間、彼女の髪の甘:
As Sophia started to say that, I pressed my lips to hers. At that
moment, the sweet scent of her hair gently tickled my nose—
